serverInfo.name: com.sap.s4/ewm-outbound-delivery
serverInfo.title: EWM Outbound Delivery MCP Server
serverInfo.description: MCP server for SAP EWM Warehouse Outbound Delivery Order and Outbound Delivery APIs. Provides tools to read and update outbound delivery headers, items, and handling unit assignments.

tools.name: get_whse_outbound_delivery_order_head
tools.title: Get Warehouse Outbound Delivery Order Header
tools.description: Retrieve a single warehouse outbound delivery order header by EWM delivery order number. Returns the delivery header including status, warehouse, shipping point, goods issue status, and blocking reason.

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g. 'EWMOutboundDeliveryOrder,GoodsIssueStatus,EWMDeliveryBlockReason')

tools.name: list_whse_outbound_delivery_order_head
tools.title: List Warehouse Outbound Delivery Order Headers
tools.description: Retrieve a list of warehouse outbound delivery order headers. Supports OData query options for filtering, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (e.g. '10')

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

tools.name: list_whse_outbound_delivery_order_items
tools.title: List Warehouse Outbound Delivery Order Items
tools.description: Retrieve all line items and assigned handling units for a specific warehouse outbound delivery order. Returns item details including product, quantities, and associated HU IDs.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

tools.name: patch_whse_outbound_delivery_order_head
tools.title: Update Warehouse Outbound Delivery Order Header
tools.description: Update a warehouse outbound delivery order header. Used to set or clear a delivery blocking reason when critical HU mismatches are detected during pallet verification.

parameters.name: EWMOutboundDeliveryOrder
parameters.description: EWM outbound delivery order number to update (e.g. '0080001234')

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON body with fields to update. To set a delivery block: {"EWMDeliveryBlockReason": "Z1"}. To clear a block: {"EWMDeliveryBlockReason": ""}.

tools.name: get_outbound_delivery_with_hus
tools.title: Get Outbound Delivery with Handling Units
tools.description: Retrieve a single outbound delivery item with all assigned handling units using the navigation to_HandlingUnitHeaderDelivery. Used to get the full HU list for a delivery.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Fields to include: EWMOutboundDeliveryOrder, EWMOutboundDeliveryOrderItem, HandlingUnitExternalID, Product, ActualDeliveryQuantity
